summary_md.en: Australia offers points-tested permanent skilled migration pathways through SkillSelect, including the Skilled Independent visa (subclass 189). Candidates usually submit an expression of interest, meet a points threshold, and wait for an invitation before applying.
summary_md.zh-Hans: 澳大利亚通过 SkillSelect 提供打分制永久技术移民路径，包括独立技术移民签证（subclass 189）。申请人通常先提交意向表达、达到分数门槛，并在受邀后再递交申请。
